items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Ran?
items.explanation: Akira Kurosawa is one of the defining characters in Ran.

items.q: The character Sergio Leone appears in Once Upon a Time in the West.
items.explanation: Sergio Leone is a key character in Once Upon a Time in the West.

items.q: The character Fernando Meirelles appears in The Lives of Others.
items.explanation: Fernando Meirelles appears in City of God, not The Lives of Others.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Wong Kar-wai.
items.explanation: Wong Kar-wai is strongly linked to In the Mood for Love.

items.q: Which movie features the character Fritz Lang?
items.explanation: Fritz Lang is associated with Metropolis.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Carol Reed.
items.explanation: Carol Reed is strongly linked to The Third Man.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Coen Brothers.
items.explanation: Coen Brothers is strongly linked to Fargo.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Passion of Joan of Arc?
items.explanation: Carl Theodor Dreyer is one of the defining characters in The Passion of Joan of Arc.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Citizen Kane?
items.explanation: Orson Welles is one of the defining characters in Citizen Kane.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Memories of Murder?
items.explanation: Bong Joon-ho is one of the defining characters in Memories of Murder.
